required_preferences.fact: Adjusts evening schedule to accommodate live online university sessions once a week, allowing teaching up to 9:30 pm — shifts wind-down and medication routine afterward for the course duration

supersedes.fact: Takes prescribed sleep medication nightly, adjusting her evening routine to allow at least 30 minutes of wind-down after ingestion — never schedules work or social activities past 9 pm

required_preferences.fact: Uses voice-to-text tools for drafting but now strictly alternates between sitting and standing every hour—with mandatory posture brace on—pausing dictation to stretch even if mid-task

supersedes.fact: Uses voice-to-text tools and dictation software for all contract drafting and business correspondence to reduce typing

required_preferences.fact: Starts each day with 10 minutes of journaling before checking emails — never skips even when busy

Begins researching travel options and blocks out two weeks after her niece or nephew's due date to stay in Seattle for hands-on family support — accommodates flexible work hours remotely during this period
Meets her book club and brunch group on the first Saturday of every month — never cancels unless out of town
Delegates complex food prep to a meal kit service and only cooks simple vegetarian dishes while her wrist heals

persona: An independent freelance consultant who regularly drafts contracts for clients
